nasb.text: And those who bow down on the housetops to the host of heaven, And those who bow down and swear to the Lord and yet swear by Milcom,

esv.text: those who bow down on the roofs to the host of the heavens, those who bow down and swear to the Lord and yet swear by Milcom,

cnv.text: 就是那些在房頂上敬拜天上萬象的， 那些敬拜耶和華， 指著他起誓，又指著瑪勒公起誓的，

ccb.text: 我必铲除那些在屋顶祭拜天上万象的人， 铲除敬拜我、凭我起誓又凭米勒公起誓的人，
